title: Experiment
description: A structured experiment designed to test a research hypothesis.

hypothesis_id.description: ID of the hypothesis this experiment tests.

client_id.description: Client this experiment is associated with.

title.description: Short descriptive title of the experiment.

methodology.description: How the experiment is conducted (e.g. 'A/B test', 'user interview', 'survey').

control_variable.description: Variables held constant to ensure a fair test.

expected_outcome.description: Predicted result if the hypothesis is correct.

created.description: ISO 8601 date the experiment was created (YYYY-MM-DD).
